name: multi-phase-taxi
description: Verify full taxi quest scenario: passenger waits → driver arrives → delivers

steps.comment: NPC 1 arrives at pickup location (phase 0: waiting)
NPCs encounter at same location (driver arrives, passenger waiting)
Day 1: phase transition to phase 1 (driving with passenger)
Both NPCs arrive at destination (phase 2: delivery complete)
Multi-phase taxi verified: passenger/driver coordination through all phases (waiting → driving → delivery)
